DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND INSPECTION DEMANDS AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE FULL, COMPLETE AND VERIFIED RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTED DISCOVERY WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY SANCTIONS OF $875 WITHIN 10 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Newton Oldfather, Esq. for Defendant. No appearance by Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motoin To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Inspection Demands And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James K. O'Gallagher, Attorney at Law, Tel. 510.264.0500, for plaintiff and opposing party;
Michael A. Gerchow, Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Inspection Demands And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Plaintiff shall provide full, complete and verified responses to the requested discovery within 10 days of this order. Plaintiff shall pay sanctions of $875 within 10 days. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motoin To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Inspection Demands And Request For Monetary Sanctions

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Inspection Demands And Request For Monetary Sanctions is continued on the court's own motion to September 10, 2014. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
